results.rendered_html:
anu-√tap to heat,  Suśr. ;
to vex, annoy,  AV. xix, 49, 7  :
Pass. -tapyate (rarely -tapyati [ MBh. i, 5055 ]), to suffer afterwards, repent;
to desiderate, miss:
Caus. -tāpayati, to distress.

results.rendered_html:
anutap 1 P.
1 To heat; vex, annoy (fig.).
2 (4 A. or pass.) To repent, grieve, be sorry for, be stung with remorse; vividhairanutapyaṃte dayitānunayairmanasvinyaḥ  V. 3. 5  (v. l. for nibhṛtairvyapatrapaṃte &c.);  Ki. 17. 40. 
— Caus. To pain, afflict, distress virahaḥ kimivānutāpayedvada bāhyairviṣayairvipaścitaṃ  R. 8. 89.
